sellers_note: ELECTRIFYING, LIGHTNING-FAST, CUTTING-EDGE, ONE-OWNER, OFF-LEASE, NONSMOKER, TESLA PERFORMANCE WITHOUT THE PLAID! The Tesla Model 3 Long Range AWD continues to set the standard for what a modern electric sports sedan can be by combining exceptional efficiency, impressive all-weather capability, exhilarating performance, and industry-leading technology into one remarkably practical package. Designed from the ground up as an electric vehicle, it delivers an ownership experience that feels distinctly different from traditional luxury sedans while maintaining the everyday comfort expected from a premium automobile. Equipped with dual electric motors and intelligent ALL-WHEEL DRIVE, the Model 3 Long Range delivers immediate acceleration, outstanding confidence in changing weather conditions, and remarkable driving range on a full charge. Whether commuting through traffic, carving through winding back roads, or embarking on cross-country adventures, it effortlessly blends performance, efficiency, and practicality. Competitive Advantage Unlike many electric sedans that simply replace a gasoline engine with a battery pack, the Model 3 was engineered around Tesla's software-first philosophy. Continual over-the-air updates, seamless Supercharger integration, advanced driver-assistance technology, and one of the industry's most intuitive user interfaces help the vehicle evolve throughout ownership. Competitors such as the BMW i4, Hyundai IONIQ 6, Polestar 2, Mercedes-Benz EQE, Lucid Air, and Genesis Electrified G80 each offer unique strengths, yet the Model 3 remains the benchmark by which many modern electric sedans continue to be measured. This particular example becomes even more exciting thanks to Acceleration Boost, Tesla's factory software upgrade that noticeably improves straight-line performance without altering the vehicle's outstanding efficiency or everyday drivability. The result is performance that moves even closer to the Model 3 Performance while preserving the exceptional driving range and comfort that define the Long Range model. Critics Commentary Professional reviewers consistently praised the Model 3 Long Range for its exceptional efficiency, responsive handling, outstanding driving range, and remarkably quick acceleration. Many also highlighted Tesla's continually evolving software ecosystem, minimalist interior design, and industry-leading Supercharger network as significant ownership advantages. Reviewers frequently noted that the Long Range AWD strikes perhaps the best balance in the entire Model 3 lineup, delivering sports-car acceleration, luxury-sedan refinement, and everyday practicality in one remarkably complete package. Awards & Recognition The Tesla Model 3 remains one of the world's most influential electric vehicles.
